parameters.query:
WITH input_user AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.username || "" }}'::TEXT AS username,
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.first_name || "" }}'::TEXT AS first_name,
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.last_name || "" }}'::TEXT AS last_name
),

prepared_user AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    username,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(TRIM(first_name || ' ' || last_name), ''),
      NULLIF(username, ''),
      'Telegram User'
    ) AS display_name
  FROM input_user
),

upsert_user AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.users (
    id,
    name,
    username,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    all_messages
  )
  SELECT
    user_id,
    display_name,
    username,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    0
  FROM prepared_user
  ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    username = EXCLUDED.username,
    first_name = EXCLUDED.first_name,
    last_name = EXCLUDED.last_name
  RETURNING id
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (
    user_id,
    title,
    created_at,
    removable
  )
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT,
    'deleted messages',
    NOW(),
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

  
old_pending AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id
  FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
),

delete_old_metadata AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  USING old_pending p
  WHERE meta.user_id = p.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND (
      meta.pending_message_id = p.id
      OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
    )
  RETURNING meta.id
),

delete_old_metadata_orphans AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  WHERE meta.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND meta.pending_message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') = 'pending'
    AND meta.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

clear_old_pending AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  USING old_pending p
  WHERE pm.id = p.id
  RETURNING pm.id
),

  

insert_pending AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.pending_messages (
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    '{{ String($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(),
    '{{ $json.message_type || "text" }}',
    {{ $json.file_id ? "'" + String($json.file_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_unique_id ? "'" + String($json.file_unique_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_name ? "'" + String($json.file_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.mime_type ? "'" + String($json.mime_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.caption ? "'" + String($json.caption).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.telegram_file_path ? "'" + String($json.telegram_file_path).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_url ? "'" + String($json.file_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.latitude !== null && $json.latitude !== undefined ? Number($json.latitude) : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.longitude !== null && $json.longitude !== undefined ? Number($json.longitude) : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.location_title ? "'" + String($json.location_title).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.location_address ? "'" + String($json.location_address).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.maps_url ? "'" + String($json.maps_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}
  )
  RETURNING *
)

SELECT
  insert_pending.id AS pending_message_id,
  insert_pending.message_uuid,
  insert_pending.user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  insert_pending.message,
  insert_pending.message_type,
  insert_pending.file_id,
  insert_pending.file_unique_id,
  insert_pending.file_name,
  insert_pending.mime_type,
  insert_pending.caption,
  insert_pending.telegram_file_path,
  insert_pending.file_url,
  insert_pending.latitude,
  insert_pending.longitude,
  insert_pending.location_title,
  insert_pending.location_address,
  insert_pending.maps_url
FROM insert_pending;

parameters.content:
Main Event Router

This block receives all incoming Telegram updates and routes them by event type.
- `message` — regular user text message
- `callback_query` — inline keyboard button click

parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.id,
  m.user_id,
  m.topic_id,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,
  m.message_type,
  m.file_id,
  m.file_unique_id,
  m.file_name,
  m.mime_type,
  m.caption,
  t.title AS topic_title,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM gnote.messages m
JOIN gnote.topics t
  ON t.id = m.topic_id
 AND t.user_id = m.user_id
WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
  AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND m.file_id IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json || {};

const chatId =
  input.chat_id ||
  input.message?.chat?.id ||
  input.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id ||
  input.callback_query?.from?.id ||
  input.message?.from?.id ||
  null;

const userId =
  input.user_id ||
  input.message?.from?.id ||
  input.callback_query?.from?.id ||
  chatId;

return [
  {
    json: {
      user_id: userId,
      chat_id: chatId,
      text:
`👋 Memoraq saves and finds your important Telegram memories.

Send me text, photos, PDFs, files, voice messages, or locations.

Commands:
/search — find saved messages by text or voice
/keywords — show all keywords
/help — show help

After /search, you can type search words or send a short voice message.

Search examples:
salary
NAYA salary
bank document
photo conference

After analysis choose:
✅ Save
➕ Add keywords
❌ Cancel`
    }
  }
];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  t.removable,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE t.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
  AND t.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND t.removable = TRUE
  AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted_messages'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.removable;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.message_id }}::BIGINT AS message_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id,
    '{{ String($json.callback_query_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS callback_query_id
),

updated AS (
  UPDATE gnote.messages m
  SET deleted_at = NOW()
  FROM input_data i
  WHERE m.id = i.message_id
    AND m.user_id = i.user_id
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  RETURNING
    m.id,
    m.user_id,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_name,
    m.caption,
    m.content,
    m.created_at
),

update_ai_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    source_status = 'deleted',
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM updated u
  WHERE meta.message_id = u.id
    AND meta.user_id = u.user_id
  RETURNING meta.id
)

SELECT
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id,

  COUNT(u.id) AS deleted_count,

  COALESCE(
    MAX(u.file_name),
    MAX(u.caption),
    MAX(u.content),
    'message'
  ) AS deleted_preview,

  MAX(u.message_type) AS message_type,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM update_ai_metadata) AS updated_metadata_count

FROM input_data i
LEFT JOIN updated u ON TRUE
GROUP BY
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.callback_query_id ? "'" + String($json.callback_query_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS callback_query_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id || "NULL" }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id
),

pending_to_delete AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    created_at
  FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
),

deleted_metadata_linked AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  USING pending_to_delete p
  WHERE meta.user_id = p.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND (
      meta.pending_message_id = p.id
      OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
    )
  RETURNING meta.id
),

deleted_pending AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  USING pending_to_delete p
  WHERE pm.id = p.id
  RETURNING pm.id
),

deleted_metadata_orphans AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  WHERE meta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND meta.pending_message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') = 'pending'
    AND meta.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

clear_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
)

SELECT
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data) AS user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,
  (SELECT callback_query_id FROM input_data) AS callback_query_id,
  (SELECT telegram_message_id FROM input_data) AS telegram_message_id,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_pending) AS deleted_count,

  (
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_metadata_linked)
    +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_metadata_orphans)
  ) AS deleted_metadata_count;

UPDATE gnote.user_state
SET
  state = 'idle',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = {{ 
  (
    $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
  )
}}::BIGINT
RETURNING user_id, state;

INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (
  user_id,
  state,
  search_query,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT,
  'waiting_search_query',
  NULL,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  state = 'waiting_search_query',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING
  user_id,
  state,
  {{ $json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id;

WITH moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    message_uuid,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    NULL,
    moved.message_uuid,
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id, user_id, message_uuid
),

attach_ai_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    pending_message_id = NULL,
    source_status = 'active',
    analysis_status = COALESCE(NULLIF(meta.analysis_status, ''), 'done'),
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted
  WHERE meta.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND (
      meta.message_uuid = inserted.message_uuid
      OR meta.message_id = inserted.id
    )
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND deleted_at IS NULL
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  stats.saved_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_ai_metadata) AS attached_metadata_count
FROM stats;

nodes.name: move pending to messages without topic

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (user_id, state, created_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  'waiting_for_extra_keywords',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  state = 'waiting_for_extra_keywords',
  created_at = NOW();

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id;

parameters.text: Send extra keywords separated by commas or spaces.  Example: invoice, taxes, Bituach Leumi, 2025

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id ? $json.user_id : 'NULL' }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id ? $json.chat_id : ($json.user_id ? $json.user_id : 'NULL') }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    ARRAY[
      {{
        ($json.extra_keywords || [])
          .filter(k => String(k).trim() !== '')
          .map(k => "'" + String(k).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")
          .join(",") || "NULL"
      }}
    ]::TEXT[] AS extra_keywords
),

pending AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT *
  FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),

metadata_targets AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT
    meta.id AS metadata_id,
    meta.user_id,
    meta.pending_message_id,
    meta.message_uuid
  FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  JOIN pending p
    ON p.user_id = meta.user_id
   AND (
        meta.pending_message_id = p.id
        OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
   )
  WHERE meta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  USING pending p
  WHERE pm.id = p.id
  RETURNING
    pm.id AS pending_id,
    pm.message_uuid,
    pm.user_id,
    pm.message,
    pm.created_at,
    pm.message_type,
    pm.file_id,
    pm.file_unique_id,
    pm.file_name,
    pm.mime_type,
    pm.caption,
    pm.telegram_file_path,
    pm.file_url,
    pm.latitude,
    pm.longitude,
    pm.location_title,
    pm.location_address,
    pm.maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    message_uuid,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    NULL,
    moved.message_uuid,
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id, user_id, message_uuid
),

attach_and_update_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    pending_message_id = NULL,
    source_status = 'active',
    analysis_status = COALESCE(NULLIF(meta.analysis_status, ''), 'done'),

    keywords = (
      SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(DISTINCT keyword), '[]'::jsonb)
      FROM (
        SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(meta.keywords, '[]'::jsonb)) AS keyword
        UNION
        SELECT unnest((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data)) AS keyword
      ) s
      WHERE keyword IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(keyword) <> ''
    ),

    ai_content = CONCAT_WS(
      E'\n',
      meta.ai_content,
      CASE
        WHEN array_length((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data), 1) > 0
        THEN 'User keywords: ' || array_to_string((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data), ', ')
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ),

    updated_at = NOW()

  FROM inserted
  JOIN metadata_targets mt
    ON mt.user_id = inserted.user_id
  WHERE meta.id = mt.metadata_id
    AND meta.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

clear_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND deleted_at IS NULL
)

SELECT
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data) AS user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,
  stats.saved_count,
  array_to_string((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data), ', ') AS added_keywords,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM metadata_targets) AS metadata_targets_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_and_update_metadata) AS attached_metadata_count
FROM stats;

nodes.name: send save with extra keywords result

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    enabled,
    max_messages,
    window_minutes
  FROM gnote.message_rate_limit_settings
  WHERE id = 1
),

settings_fallback AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT enabled FROM settings), TRUE) AS enabled,
    COALESCE((SELECT max_messages FROM settings), 10) AS max_messages,
    COALESCE((SELECT window_minutes FROM settings), 60) AS window_minutes
),

user_flags AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(u.unlimited, FALSE) AS unlimited
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN gnote.users u
    ON u.id = i.user_id
),

pending_usage AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::INT AS pending_count
  FROM gnote.pending_messages p
  CROSS JOIN settings_fallback s
  WHERE p.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND p.created_at >= NOW() - make_interval(mins => s.window_minutes)
),

saved_usage AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::INT AS saved_count
  FROM gnote.messages m
  CROSS JOIN settings_fallback s
  WHERE m.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.created_at >= NOW() - make_interval(mins => s.window_minutes)
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
),

usage_sum AS (
  SELECT
    (
      COALESCE((SELECT pending_count FROM pending_usage), 0) +
      COALESCE((SELECT saved_count FROM saved_usage), 0)
    )::INT AS used_messages
),

decision AS (
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,

    s.enabled,
    s.max_messages,
    s.window_minutes,

    COALESCE(f.unlimited, FALSE) AS unlimited,

    u.used_messages,

    CASE
      WHEN s.enabled = FALSE THEN TRUE
      WHEN COALESCE(f.unlimited, FALSE) = TRUE THEN TRUE
      WHEN u.used_messages < s.max_messages THEN TRUE
      ELSE FALSE
    END AS allowed,

    GREATEST(s.max_messages - u.used_messages, 0) AS remaining_messages

  FROM input_data i
  CROSS JOIN settings_fallback s
  CROSS JOIN usage_sum u
  LEFT JOIN user_flags f ON TRUE
)

SELECT
  user_id,
  chat_id,

  enabled,
  unlimited,
  allowed,

  used_messages,
  max_messages,
  window_minutes,
  remaining_messages,

  CASE
    WHEN allowed THEN NULL
    ELSE
      'Limit reached ⚠️' || E'\n\n' ||
      'You can save up to ' || max_messages || ' messages per ' || window_minutes || ' minutes.' || E'\n' ||
      'Please try again later.'
  END AS limit_message

FROM decision;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{
      $json.message?.from?.id
      || $json.callback_query?.from?.id
      || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
      || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
    }}::BIGINT AS user_id,

    {{
      $json.message?.chat?.id
      || $json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.chat?.id
      || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
    }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

metadata_with_message AS (
  SELECT
    meta.id AS metadata_id,
    meta.user_id,
    meta.message_id,
    meta.pending_message_id,
    meta.message_uuid,
    meta.source_status,
    meta.keywords,

    m.id AS real_message_id,
    m.deleted_at AS message_deleted_at

  FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta

  LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
    ON m.user_id = meta.user_id
   AND (
        m.id = meta.message_id
        OR m.message_uuid = meta.message_uuid
   )

  WHERE meta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, '') <> 'deleted'
    AND meta.keywords IS NOT NULL
    AND jsonb_typeof(meta.keywords) = 'array'
    AND jsonb_array_length(meta.keywords) > 0
),

valid_metadata AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM metadata_with_message
  WHERE
    -- Case 1: metadata is attached to an existing non-deleted message
    (
      real_message_id IS NOT NULL
      AND message_deleted_at IS NULL
    )

    OR

    -- Case 2: metadata still has no message_id, but is not deleted.
    -- This keeps keywords visible even if attach step did not update message_id correctly.
    (
      real_message_id IS NULL
      AND COALESCE(source_status, 'pending') IN ('pending', 'attached', 'active')
    )
),

keywords_raw AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(k.keyword) AS keyword
  FROM valid_metadata vm
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(
    COALESCE(vm.keywords, '[]'::jsonb)
  ) AS k(keyword)
  WHERE k.keyword IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(k.keyword) <> ''
),

normalized AS (
  SELECT
    LOWER(keyword) AS keyword_order_key,
    MIN(keyword) AS display_keyword,
    COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS usage_count
  FROM keywords_raw
  GROUP BY LOWER(keyword)
)

SELECT
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data) AS user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,
  display_keyword AS keyword,
  usage_count
FROM normalized
ORDER BY usage_count DESC, LOWER(display_keyword) ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.message_id }}::BIGINT AS message_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id,
    '{{ String($json.callback_query_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS callback_query_id
),

message_data AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS message_id,
    m.user_id,
    m.message_uuid,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_name,
    m.caption,
    m.content,
    m.created_at
  FROM gnote.messages m
  WHERE m.id = (SELECT message_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  LIMIT 1
),

metadata_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    meta.*,
    CASE
      WHEN meta.message_id = m.message_id THEN 1
      WHEN meta.message_uuid = m.message_uuid THEN 2
      ELSE 9
    END AS match_rank
  FROM message_data m
  JOIN gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
    ON meta.user_id = m.user_id
   AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, '') <> 'deleted'
   AND (
        meta.message_id = m.message_id
        OR meta.message_uuid = m.message_uuid
   )
),

best_metadata AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM metadata_candidates
  ORDER BY
    match_rank ASC,
    updated_at DESC NULLS LAST,
    id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id,

  m.message_type,
  m.file_name,
  m.caption,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,

  b.summary AS ai_summary,
  b.category AS ai_category,
  b.language AS ai_language,
  b.keywords AS ai_keywords,
  b.ai_content AS ai_content,

  CASE
    WHEN m.message_id IS NULL THEN FALSE
    ELSE TRUE
  END AS found,

  CASE
    WHEN b.id IS NULL THEN FALSE
    ELSE TRUE
  END AS ai_found,

  b.id AS ai_metadata_id,
  b.message_id AS ai_metadata_message_id,
  b.message_uuid AS ai_metadata_message_uuid,
  b.source_status AS ai_source_status

FROM input_data i
LEFT JOIN message_data m ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN best_metadata b ON TRUE;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id || $json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

upsert_state AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (
    user_id,
    state,
    search_query,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    user_id,
    'waiting_search_query',
    NULL,
    NOW()
  FROM input_data
  ON CONFLICT (user_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    state = 'waiting_search_query',
    search_query = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING user_id, state
)

SELECT
  input_data.user_id,
  input_data.chat_id,
  upsert_state.state
FROM input_data
JOIN upsert_state ON upsert_state.user_id = input_data.user_id;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{
      (
        $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id
        || $('Parse search audio query').first().json.user_id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS user_id,

    {{
      (
        $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.chat_id
        || $('Parse search audio query').first().json.chat_id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.chat?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,

    '{{ String(
      $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.search_query
      || $('Parse search audio query').first().json.search_query
      || ''
    ).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS search_query,

    '{{ String(JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json))).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS raw_results
),

delete_previous_sessions AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  USING input_data i
  WHERE ss.user_id = i.user_id
  RETURNING ss.id
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.top_relevant_limit'
      ),
      10
    ) AS top_relevant_limit,

    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.max_results_limit'
      ),
      100
    ) AS max_results_limit
),

valid_results AS (
  SELECT
    elem.value AS result_json,
    elem.ordinality AS source_position
  FROM input_data i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(i.raw_results) WITH ORDINALITY elem(value, ordinality)
  WHERE
    COALESCE(elem.value->>'no_results', 'false') <> 'true'
    AND COALESCE(elem.value->>'message_id', elem.value->>'id', '') <> ''
),

limited_valid_results AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM valid_results
  WHERE source_position <= (SELECT max_results_limit FROM settings)
),

insert_session AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_sessions (
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    search_query,
    total_count
  )
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    i.search_query,
    COUNT(lvr.result_json)::INTEGER
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
  GROUP BY i.user_id, i.chat_id, i.search_query
  RETURNING id, user_id, chat_id, search_query, total_count
),

prepared_results AS (
  SELECT
    ins.id AS search_session_id,
    ins.user_id,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'message_id', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'id', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS message_id,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_position', '')::INTEGER,
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_number', '')::INTEGER,
          lvr.source_position::INTEGER
        )
    )::INTEGER AS result_position,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'relevance_score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULL
    ) AS relevance_score,

    lvr.result_json AS result_payload
  FROM insert_session ins
  JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
),

insert_results AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_session_results (
    search_session_id,
    message_id,
    result_position,
    relevance_score,
    result_payload
  )
  SELECT
    pr.search_session_id,
    pr.message_id,
    pr.result_position,
    pr.relevance_score,
    pr.result_payload
  FROM prepared_results pr
  JOIN gnote.messages m
    ON m.id = pr.message_id
   AND m.user_id = pr.user_id
   AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  WHERE pr.message_id IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (search_session_id, message_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  ins.id AS search_session_id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit,
  COUNT(ir.id)::INTEGER AS saved_results_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_previous_sessions)::INTEGER AS deleted_previous_search_sessions
FROM insert_session ins
CROSS JOIN settings s
LEFT JOIN insert_results ir ON TRUE
GROUP BY
  ins.id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ String($json.search_session_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::UUID AS callback_search_session_id,
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS callback_user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS callback_chat_id,
    '{{ String($json.mode || "top").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS mode
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.top_relevant_limit'
      ),
      10
    ) AS top_relevant_limit
),

resolved_session AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT r.search_session_id
        FROM gnote.search_session_results r
        JOIN input_data i ON r.search_session_id = i.callback_search_session_id
        LIMIT 1
      ),
      (
        SELECT ss.id
        FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
        JOIN input_data i ON ss.user_id = i.callback_user_id
        WHERE EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM gnote.search_session_results r
          WHERE r.search_session_id = ss.id
        )
        ORDER BY ss.created_at DESC
        LIMIT 1
      )
    ) AS search_session_id
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    rs.search_session_id,
    i.callback_user_id,
    i.callback_chat_id,
    i.mode,
    s.top_relevant_limit,

    ss.user_id AS session_user_id,
    ss.chat_id AS session_chat_id,
    ss.search_query,
    ss.total_count,

    r.result_position,
    r.relevance_score,
    r.result_payload,
    r.message_id AS stored_message_id,

    i.callback_search_session_id

  FROM input_data i
  CROSS JOIN settings s
  CROSS JOIN resolved_session rs

  JOIN gnote.search_session_results r
    ON r.search_session_id = rs.search_session_id

  LEFT JOIN gnote.search_sessions ss
    ON ss.id = rs.search_session_id

  WHERE rs.search_session_id IS NOT NULL
),

joined AS (
  SELECT
    b.search_session_id,
    b.callback_search_session_id,

    COALESCE(b.session_user_id, b.callback_user_id) AS user_id,
    COALESCE(b.session_chat_id, b.callback_chat_id) AS chat_id,

    b.search_query,
    COALESCE(b.total_count, COUNT(*) OVER ())::INTEGER AS total_count,
    b.mode,
    b.top_relevant_limit,

    b.result_position,
    b.relevance_score,
    b.result_payload,

    COALESCE(
      m.id,
      b.stored_message_id,
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(b.result_payload->>'message_id', '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        THEN (b.result_payload->>'message_id')::BIGINT
        ELSE NULL
      END,
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(b.result_payload->>'id', '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        THEN (b.result_payload->>'id')::BIGINT
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ) AS message_id,

    COALESCE(m.content, b.result_payload->>'content') AS content,

    COALESCE(
      m.created_at,
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(b.result_payload->>'created_at', '') <> ''
        THEN (b.result_payload->>'created_at')::TIMESTAMPTZ
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ) AS created_at,

    COALESCE(m.message_type, b.result_payload->>'message_type', 'text') AS message_type,

    COALESCE(m.file_id, b.result_payload->>'file_id') AS file_id,
    COALESCE(m.file_unique_id, b.result_payload->>'file_unique_id') AS file_unique_id,
    COALESCE(m.file_name, b.result_payload->>'file_name') AS file_name,
    COALESCE(m.mime_type, b.result_payload->>'mime_type') AS mime_type,
    COALESCE(m.caption, b.result_payload->>'caption') AS caption,

    COALESCE(
      m.latitude,
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(b.result_payload->>'latitude', '') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
        THEN (b.result_payload->>'latitude')::DOUBLE PRECISION
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ) AS latitude,

    COALESCE(
      m.longitude,
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(b.result_payload->>'longitude', '') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
        THEN (b.result_payload->>'longitude')::DOUBLE PRECISION
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ) AS longitude,

    COALESCE(m.location_title, b.result_payload->>'location_title') AS location_title,
    COALESCE(m.location_address, b.result_payload->>'location_address') AS location_address,
    COALESCE(m.maps_url, b.result_payload->>'maps_url') AS maps_url,

    COALESCE(t.title, b.result_payload->>'topic_title') AS topic_title,

    COALESCE(
      b.result_payload->>'display_text',
      m.file_name,
      m.caption,
      m.content,
      m.location_title,
      m.location_address,
      m.maps_url,
      b.result_payload->>'ai_summary',
      b.result_payload->>'content',
      b.result_payload->>'caption',
      b.result_payload->>'file_name',
      'Message'
    ) AS display_text

  FROM base b

  LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
    ON m.id = b.stored_message_id
   AND m.deleted_at IS NULL

  LEFT JOIN gnote.topics t
    ON t.id = m.topic_id
   AND t.user_id = m.user_id
)

SELECT
  user_id,
  chat_id,

  search_session_id,
  callback_search_session_id,

  search_query,
  total_count,
  mode,
  top_relevant_limit,

  result_position,
  relevance_score,

  message_id,
  content,
  display_text,
  created_at,
  message_type,
  file_id,
  file_unique_id,
  file_name,
  mime_type,
  caption,
  latitude,
  longitude,
  location_title,
  location_address,
  maps_url,
  topic_title,

  result_payload
FROM joined
WHERE
  message_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    mode = 'all'
    OR result_position <= top_relevant_limit
  )
ORDER BY result_position ASC;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.user_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.message?.from?.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message?.from?.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($("Telegram Trigger").first().json.callback_query?.from?.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS user_id,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.message_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.saved_message_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS message_id,

    NULLIF('{{ String($json.message_uuid || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::UUID AS message_uuid
),

message_ref AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS message_id,
    m.user_id,
    m.message_uuid
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN input_data i
    ON m.user_id = i.user_id
   AND (
        m.id = i.message_id
        OR m.message_uuid = i.message_uuid
   )
  WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),

updated_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = mr.message_id,
    pending_message_id = NULL,
    source_status = 'active',
    analysis_status = COALESCE(NULLIF(meta.analysis_status, ''), 'done'),
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM message_ref mr
  WHERE meta.user_id = mr.user_id
    AND (
      meta.message_id = mr.message_id
      OR meta.message_uuid = mr.message_uuid
    )
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
  RETURNING
    meta.id,
    meta.user_id,
    meta.message_id,
    meta.message_uuid,
    meta.source_status
)

SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT user_id FROM message_ref), (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)) AS user_id,
  (SELECT message_id FROM message_ref) AS message_id,
  (SELECT message_uuid FROM message_ref) AS message_uuid,
  COUNT(um.id)::INTEGER AS updated_ai_metadata_rows,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(um.id) > 0 THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'not_found'
  END AS final_source_status
FROM updated_metadata um
RIGHT JOIN input_data i ON TRUE
GROUP BY i.user_id;
